sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101806" key="sxe/dh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σχέδ-η</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n101806.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leaf, page</tr_>, dub. cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Lex. de Spir.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.214V.</biblScope> </bibl>; Lat. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scheda</tr_> is a Greek word acc. to <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Isid.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Etym.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.14.8</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σχίδα</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
